symptoms.symptom_name: Postural dizziness on standing, eased by sitting/lying

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Strictly positional dizziness is the hallmark of orthostatic hypotension.
Vestibular vertigo is constant and present at rest, not purely on standing.

symptoms.symptom_name: Persistent nausea temporally linked to opioid initiation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Nausea starting with the opioid, then an antiemetic added, is a classic prescribing cascade.
No fever or diarrhoea; the temporal link is to a drug, not an infection.
Drug-induced hypotension is a leading cause of falls in the frail elderly.
Any fall in a frail elder mandates consideration of occult injury, especially with bleeding risk.

symptoms.symptom_name: High pill burden — ~12 medications from multiple uncoordinated prescribers

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Polypharmacy with 5+ interacting drugs is the substrate for iatrogenic orthostatic hypotension, nausea and falls.

symptoms.symptom_name: Postural BP drop ~45 mmHg systolic (140/85 supine to 95/60 standing)

investigation_details.expected_result: A systolic drop of >20 mmHg (here ~45 mmHg) on standing — confirms orthostatic hypotension
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The drug-induced hypotension is not objectively confirmed and the fall risk is under-appreciated.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A reproducible large postural systolic drop is the defining sign — a sealed clinician measurement the AI Doctor cannot obtain.
Beta-blockade slows the rate and blunts the compensatory tachycardia to postural hypotension.
A slow pulse must be assessed with an in-person pulse/ECG to exclude a conduction cause.
New bleeding on an NSAID in an older adult signals bleeding/renal risk needing bloods.

symptoms.symptom_name: Transient acute confusion in the past week

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Acute confusion in a frail elder is a red flag for a reversible cause and must not be dismissed as baseline.

symptoms.symptom_name: No constant spinning vertigo, absent at rest; no nystagmus

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The absence of constant vertigo and nystagmus argues strongly against a vestibular cause.

symptoms.symptom_name: No focal motor deficit / no signs of acute stroke; afebrile

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No focal deficit and afebrile reduce (but at telehealth cannot fully exclude) stroke and sepsis.

symptoms.symptom_name: U&E / eGFR and full blood examination

investigation_details.investigation_name: Renal function and full blood examination
investigation_details.expected_result: Assess renal function (NSAID/antihypertensive effect) and haemoglobin given recent epistaxis
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Occult renal impairment or anaemia from bleeding is missed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bloods characterise renal and bleeding risk — a lab investigation never available in real time in telehealth.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: adverse drug event / polypharmacy-related orthostatic hypotension
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Postural dizziness + high pill burden + a large postural BP drop + beta-blocker bradycardia together define drug-induced orthostatic hypotension.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: opioid-induced nausea treated with an added antiemetic
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Nausea from the opioid met with a new antiemetic instead of stopping the opioid is a textbook prescribing cascade.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Objectively confirms the postural drop; cannot be obtained reliably by the AI Doctor at telehealth.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person medication reconciliation + Home Medicines Review
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Physically match every bottle/blister pack to the prescribed list, identify interactions and rationalise — the definitive management step.
Assess the bradycardia and exclude a conduction cause of the dizziness.
Characterise renal function and bleeding risk given the NSAID and recent epistaxis.
